name: Linzer Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with electric mixer at high speed, beat margarine and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in flour, almonds, lemon peel, and cinnamon until blended.
3. Cover; chill 2 hours.
4. Divide dough in half.
5. On a floured surface, roll out one half of dough to 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Using 2-1/2-inch round cookie cutter, cut circles from dough.
7. Reroll scraps to make additional rounds.
8. Cut out 1/2-inch circles from centers of half the rounds.
9. Repeat with remaining dough.
10. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
11. Bake at 325°F for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from sheets; cool on wire racks.
12. Spread preserves on top of whole cookies.
13. Top with cut-out cookies to make sandwiches.
14. Dust with confectioners' sugar.
Makes 2 dozen cookies.
